# Alphaa

> Alphaa is an automated AI Search Optimization (AEO) platform that helps businesses get discovered, cited, and recommended by AI assistants — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. It works for any business, local or online.

Alphaa replaces expensive SEO agencies with automated AEO: it optimizes the content, structured data, and signals that AI engines actually read, so your business shows up when people ask AI for recommendations.

## Core value proposition

- Replaces $1,000/month SEO agencies with automated AI Search Optimization for $99/month.
- Free, 60-second AI Visibility Scan — see how your business appears across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity. No signup or credit card required.
- 14-day risk-free trial. No contracts, cancel anytime.
- Works for any business — local services, online stores, SaaS, agencies, and B2B.

## Pages

- [Home](https://alphaa.app/): What Alphaa does and how it gets you found on AI search.
- [Free AI Visibility Scan](https://alphaa.app/scan): Instant, 60-second scan of your visibility across the major AI engines.
- [How It Works](https://alphaa.app/how-it-works): How Alphaa optimizes your AI search presence, step by step.
- [Pricing](https://alphaa.app/pricing): Starter ($99/month) and Pro ($199/month). 14-day free trial, no credit card to start.
- [Case Studies](https://alphaa.app/case-studies): Businesses that improved their AI visibility with Alphaa.
- [Referral Program](https://alphaa.app/refer): Earn 30% recurring commission for referrals.
- [Privacy Policy](https://alphaa.app/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://alphaa.app/terms)

## What Alphaa does

- AI Visibility Score: tracks how often and how accurately ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI cite your business.
- Structured data & schema: generates and deploys JSON-LD (LocalBusiness/Organization and more) so engines understand your business.
- llms.txt: generates and hosts an llms.txt for your business so AI assistants can read who you are and what you offer.
- Google Business Profile automation: writes and publishes posts, surfaces reviews to respond to, and keeps your profile active.
- Content & gap analysis: finds topics your competitors rank for that you're missing, and generates content in your voice.
- Website health: crawls your site for issues — including whether AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot) are blocked from reading it.
- Competitor intelligence and weekly plain-English reports — all on autopilot.

## How it actually works (the mechanism)

AI assistants answer using a mix of (1) content they have indexed and (2) live web search / retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). They favor businesses with clear, structured, consistent, well-cited information. Alphaa improves exactly those signals — accurate schema markup, an llms.txt, an active and consistent Google Business Profile, fresh on-topic content, and clean technical SEO — so when an AI engine retrieves and summarizes the web to answer a question, your business is the well-described, easy-to-cite option. Alphaa does not (and cannot) edit an AI model's internal data directly; it improves the public signals those models read.

## Alphaa vs other tools

- vs traditional SEO agencies ($1,000+/month): Alphaa automates the work for $99/month and targets AI answers, not just Google's blue links.
- vs SEO tools (e.g. Semrush): those analyze keywords and rankings; Alphaa also generates and publishes the content, schema, and posts, and optimizes specifically for AI engines.
- vs listing tools (e.g. Yext): those sync directory listings; Alphaa optimizes you to be recommended inside AI answers.
